page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bi-channel image registration and deep-learning segmentation (BIRDS) is a tool for efficient, versatile 3D mapping of mouse brain. It is an open source automation pipeline suitable for brain data from different microscopy platforms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bi-channel image registration and deep-learning segmentation (BIRDS) is a tool for efficient, versatile 3D mapping of mouse brain. It is an open source automation pipeline suitable for brain data from different microscopy platforms.
